title: penstemon scariosus var. scariosus
intro: Penstemon scariosus var. scariosus, also known as the hairy beardtongue, is a perennial plant species belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae) and is native to North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Penstemon scariosus var. scariosus include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be ingested orally or applied topically to the skin.
